CYBERPUNK_AGENT.TITLE: Cyberpunk Agent
CYBERPUNK_AGENT.DESCRIPTION: A FoundryVTT module that adds a cyberpunk-style messaging system for players to communicate through their characters' agents

CHAT7.TITLE: Chat7
CHAT7.NO_CONTACTS_DESC: The GM needs to configure your contacts in the module settings.

DIALOGS.SELECT_ACTOR_DESC: Choose which Actor to use with the Agent:

NOTIFICATIONS.NO_ACTOR_ACCESS: You don't have access to any Actor to use the Agent.

NOTIFICATION_SOUND.NAME: Notification Sound
NOTIFICATION_SOUND.HINT: Play a sound when you receive a new Agent message

TOAST_NOTIFICATIONS.NAME: Toast Notifications
TOAST_NOTIFICATIONS.HINT: Show a toast notification popup when you receive a new Agent message

PLAYER_CHAT_NOTIFICATIONS.NAME: Show Agent Notifications in Chat
PLAYER_CHAT_NOTIFICATIONS.HINT: Display a notification in Foundry chat when you send or receive an Agent message

ENABLE_TOKEN_HUD_BUTTON.NAME: Show Agent in Token Menu
ENABLE_TOKEN_HUD_BUTTON.HINT: Add an Agent button to the token right-click menu for tokens with equipped Agents

ENABLE_FAB_BUTTON.NAME: Show Floating Agent Button
ENABLE_FAB_BUTTON.HINT: Display a draggable floating button on the canvas for quick Agent access

ENABLE_TOKEN_CONTROLS_BUTTON.NAME: Show Agent in Token Controls
ENABLE_TOKEN_CONTROLS_BUTTON.HINT: Display the Agent button in the left-side token controls toolbar

GM_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: GM Chat7 Management
GM_MANAGEMENT.DESCRIPTION: Use these tools to manage all Cyberpunk Agent data across all devices.

CLEAR_MESSAGES.TITLE: Clear All Messages
CLEAR_MESSAGES.HINT: Delete ALL chat message histories for ALL devices. This action cannot be undone.
CLEAR_MESSAGES.CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will delete ALL chat message histories for ALL devices in the registry. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?

CLEAR_CONTACTS.TITLE: Clear All Contact Lists
CLEAR_CONTACTS.HINT: Clear contact lists from all devices. Devices will remain but contacts will be removed.
CLEAR_CONTACTS.CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will clear all contact lists from all devices. Devices will remain but contacts will be removed. Are you sure?

SYNC_DEVICES.TITLE: Synchronize All Devices
SYNC_DEVICES.HINT: Update device names, avatars, and ensure all devices have phone numbers.
SYNC_DEVICES.CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will update actor data, synchronize phone numbers, and sync all client message history from the server. Local-only messages may be lost. Continue?

MASTER_RESET.TITLE: Master Reset System
MASTER_RESET.HINT: DANGER: Completely reset the entire system - clears ALL messages, ALL contacts, and forces ALL clients to restart. This is IRREVERSIBLE!
MASTER_RESET.CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This will completely reset the entire Cyberpunk Agent system. ALL messages, ALL contacts will be deleted, and ALL clients will be forced to restart. This action is IRREVERSIBLE! Are you absolutely sure?

ZMAIL.TITLE: ZMail Management
ZMAIL.DESCRIPTION: Corporate messaging system for secure GM-to-player communications

COMPOSE.SUBJECT: Subject
COMPOSE.CONTENT_HINT: HTML formatting supported. Players cannot reply to ZMail messages.

MARK_READ.TITLE: Mark All as Read
MARK_READ.DESC: Mark all messages as read for all players
MARK_READ.CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to mark all ZMail messages as read?

CLEAR_OLD.TITLE: Clear Old Messages
CLEAR_OLD.CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete ZMail messages older than 30 days?

RECENT.TITLE: Recent ZMail Messages
RECENT.NO_MESSAGES_HINT: Start by composing your first ZMail message in the Compose tab.
RECENT.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this ZMail message?

ZMAIL.FOOTER: ZMail is a secure, one-way messaging system. Players can read, mark as read, and delete messages, but cannot reply.
